sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115460" key="yeudepieikh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδεπι-εικής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n115460.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pretending to be good,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.2</biblScope> </bibl> (in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(2).58</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
